title: ornithopteris coriacea
intro: Ornithopteris coriacea, also known as the Queensland fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds that have been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Ornithopteris coriacea are often made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using it in tinctures and capsules, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
